notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen grounds into a double play, third baseman Coby Mayo to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Andrew McCutchen out at 2nd. Danny Jansen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith pops out to third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Evan Carter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Evan Carter lines out to left fielder Dylan Beavers.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith flies out to right fielder Colton Cowser.

notableEvents.label: Evan Carter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Evan Carter called out on strikes.
